description_long: This house features a light blue exterior with white trim and a prominent front-facing garage door, topped by a shingled roof section. The structure is rectangular and elongated, with a single main story and a flat roof at the rear. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a large garage door and a set of windows above, while the rear section opens to a covered patio or porch area. The overall design is clean and modern, with subtle traditional elements such as the shingled roof and classic window framing.
description: A light blue, single-story house with a front garage, symmetrical windows, and a mix of shingled and flat roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, shingled roof, and main entry windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, rectangular shape, multiple windows, and the covered rear patio.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible patio/porch area and additional windows, less emphasis on the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the flat roof section at the back.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry integrated with garage, featuring a large garage door, steps leading to the front door, and classic window framing above.
